hero.title: Manage your finances from
hero.subtitle: Send your expenses and income with a message. Our AI automatically detects categories, amounts and dates. Visualize everything in a professional and secure dashboard.

product.title: Meet your agent
product.subtitle: A personal finance management platform powered by Fin, your intelligent agent. Connected to WhatsApp, it turns every natural message into structured data and instant analysis.

features.aiDesc: Automatic detection of amounts, categories and dates in every message.
features.whatsappDesc: Use the app you already have. Nothing else to download — just message on WhatsApp.
features.secureDesc: Bank-grade encryption. Your data is always yours.
features.recommendationsDesc: Personalized insights about your spending and saving habits.

features.titleStart: Everything you need to manage your
features.subtitle: Tools designed to provide control, clarity and simplicity. A product that adapts to your pace, not the other way around.

items.whatsappDesc: Send your income and expenses with text or voice in a fast and natural way.
items.dashboardDesc: View monthly totals, categories and clear interactive charts.
items.privacyDesc: Your data stays secure and fully under your control.
items.alertsDesc: Get notifications about important expenses and budget limits.
items.exportDesc: Easily download your financial history for in-depth analysis.
items.multiplatformDesc: Available from any device with an updated browser.

workflow.subtitle: Fin simplifies financial management in six steps, designed so you can control your finances by chatting naturally.

steps.s1Desc: Sign up with your email and verify in seconds, no complications.
steps.s2Desc: Connect your WhatsApp number. Fin, your financial agent, will be available 24/7.
steps.s3Desc: Send natural messages like "Lunch €15" or "Salary €2,000". Voice works too.
steps.s4Desc: Our engine detects amount, category, type and date automatically.
steps.s5Desc: Professional dashboard with charts, monthly trends and comparisons.
steps.s6Desc: Download your data as CSV for audit, advanced analysis or accounting.

pricing.subtitle: Start for free with no strings attached. Try Fin for 14 days with full access, no credit card required. Then choose the format that best suits you.
pricing.benefit1Desc: Full platform access. No credit card, no commitments.
pricing.benefit2Desc: Full flexibility. No penalties, no small print.
pricing.benefit3Desc: A single plan with complete access to all tools.
pricing.ctaNote: Includes full access to Fin on WhatsApp. No commitments.

contact.subtitle: Our team is ready to help. Write to us and we'll get back to you in record time.

features.availableDesc: Our platform and contact channels are always on.
features.secureDesc: Your information is handled with bank-grade encryption and privacy.
features.personalDesc: Every inquiry is reviewed and answered by a person on our team.

about.subtitle: A professional financial management platform designed to help you take control of your personal and business finances with ease.
about.missionText: Democratize financial management by bringing artificial intelligence and automation to every person and business, no matter their background. We want anyone to be able to record, analyze and improve their finances simply by sending a message on WhatsApp.
about.teamText: FinTrack is made up of professionals with experience in technology, finance and customer service. We bet on innovation, ethics and closeness to our users.

reasons.simplicityDesc: Forget spreadsheets and complex apps. All you need is WhatsApp and your voice or text.
reasons.aiDesc: Our artificial intelligence automatically detects amounts, categories and dates.
reasons.securityDesc: Data protected with bank-grade encryption, never shared with third parties.
reasons.transparencyDesc: No small print. Free trial without card and pick the plan that fits you best.
reasons.supportDesc: Our team is available to help and listen to your suggestions.
reasons.precisionDesc: Professional dashboard with organized data to make better financial decisions.

about.audienceText: FinTrack is ideal for anyone looking for modern, no-fuss financial management.

company.subtitle: FinTrack is a Spanish fintech with the mission of bringing personal financial management to everyone, combining artificial intelligence and simplicity on a single platform.
company.whoText: A team combining experience in artificial intelligence, software development and financial services to build tools that truly simplify our users' lives.
company.visionText: We believe technology should work for people. That's why we integrate FinTrack into the tools you already use every day, like WhatsApp, instead of forcing you to learn a new app.

values.transparencyDesc: No hidden costs, no small print. We communicate clearly in every interaction.
values.accessibilityDesc: We design financial tools for everyone, regardless of their background.
values.innovationDesc: We bet on artificial intelligence and the most advanced technologies of the sector.
values.securityDesc: We apply banking standards to protect the information you trust us with.

company.hqText: Málaga, Spain · Team distributed across Europe

faqsPage.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about FinTrack. If you don't find what you're looking for, message us directly.
faqsPage.notFoundTitle: Can't find what you're looking for?

items.a1: FinTrack is a personal financial management platform that lets you record your income and expenses via WhatsApp. Our AI agent, Fin, processes your messages and turns them into organized data you can visualize in a professional dashboard.
items.a2: Just send a message to our WhatsApp number with your expense or income in natural language (for example: 'I spent €30 at a restaurant'). Our AI will automatically detect the amount, category and date.
items.q3: Is it safe to share my financial data?
items.a3: Yes. We use SSL/TLS encryption across all communications, store passwords with robust hash algorithms (bcrypt) and comply with GDPR. Your data is never shared with third parties.
items.a4: We offer a 14-day free trial without requiring a credit card. Afterwards you can choose between the Monthly plan (€2.99/month) or Annual plan (€30/year, saving 17%).
items.a5: Yes, you can cancel your subscription anytime from the Billing section of your dashboard. You'll keep access until the end of the billing period, and your data will be retained for 12 months.
items.a6: FinTrack includes predefined categories such as Salary, Groceries, Transport, Restaurants, Leisure, Subscriptions and more. You can also create, edit and delete custom categories from the Categories section.
items.a7: Yes, you can export your transactions in CSV format from any dashboard section. This lets you analyze your data in spreadsheets or external tools.
items.q8: Does it work in Spain and other countries?
items.a8: FinTrack is currently optimized for users in Spain and the euro zone, but can be used from any country. Amounts are shown in euros (€).

legal.disclaimer: Texts are provided in Spanish only. The Spanish version is the legally binding one in case of discrepancy with any translation.

plans.trialDescExpired: Access to the dashboard and the AI assistant is locked. Choose a plan to continue.

faqs.q1: What happens when the 14-day trial ends?
faqs.a1: Access to the dashboard and the AI assistant is blocked. Your data is preserved and you'll regain full access as soon as you pick a paid plan.
faqs.q2: Do both plans offer the same access?
faqs.a2: Yes, both options unlock exactly the same features. The only difference is the billing frequency: monthly, or annual with a discount.
faqs.a3: Yes, you can cancel your subscription whenever you want from the billing section. You'll keep access until your current billing period ends.
faqs.q4: Can I switch between monthly and annual?
faqs.a4: Absolutely. You can change your billing frequency at any time. The change will apply at your next billing cycle.
faqs.a5: All payments are processed through Stripe, the world's leading payment platform. We never store your card details.
